remediation: TWO coupled defects in hx doti update. D1 worktree-leak/commit-race: (b) DotiWorktreeUpdate.Run dispose the temp worktree BEFORE DotiReconcileCommit.Commit (commit ~:74 inside try, Dispose ~:89 in finally); (c) route outcome.Commit.Status==Failed to CliResults.Fail (ok:false/non-zero/Integrity) in RunnerCommands.Doti.Update.cs:32-44 + count Commit-Failed as update-all batch failures (honor the DotiCommitStatus.Failed 'never silently swallowed' contract, DotiVersionContracts.cs:70-78); (a) GitWorktree.PruneLeakedTemps sweep of prior hx-doti-worktree-* at run start + in Dispose (remove --force else Directory.Delete the husk THEN prune; instrumented, replacing the bare catch{} at GitWorktree.cs:135-152); (d) DotiReconcileCommit retry-on-transient-lock then Failed. D2 vendored-tool reconcile gap: tools/sentrux(+gitleaks/gitversion) is scanned into managed-assets.json (ManagedAssetScanner.cs:156) but the reconcile loop (DotiInstaller.cs:65-85, StaticDotiSubdirectories:18 = .doti/{sub} only) and the parity loop (DotiPayloadParityChecker.cs:9,41-71) never touch tools/ so a stale vendored-tool manifest is recorded-but-never-reconciled-or-checked (ergon left on Sentrux v0.5.11 after 0.18.0 -> silent broken gate). (e) add a tools/ reconcile pass in DotiInstaller (StaticToolSubdirectories=[gitleaks,sentrux,gitversion] -> ReconcileManagedTree, reusing the existing preserve/.new machinery; bin/+obj/ already excluded by the scanner :171-172); (f) add CheckToolFiles to DotiPayloadParityChecker (tools/{sub} minus bin/, new kind 'vendored-tool') so a stale manifest/grammar fails payload check; (g) DotiUpdater advisory 'run hx tools fetch --tool <tool>' on a vendored-tool manifest change -- do NOT auto-fetch the exe (keep update/install offline/deterministic); SentruxManifestValidator.Verify (:16-30) already fail-closes on exe-hash-mismatch -> a clear stale-binary error replaces the cryptic 'Could not read baseline'. Tests: deterministic for both defects + fault-injection for the commit retry.
summary: hx doti update: (1) the self-commit runs while its own temp worktree is live -> intermittent lock-race + silent Failed-swallow + leaked temps never pruned; (2) the reconcile+parity loops are .doti/{sub}-only so vendored-tool dirs (tools/sentrux|gitleaks|gitversion) are recorded-managed but never reconciled/checked -> a stale Sentrux silently breaks the gate after a version bump.
